info.title: Strom API
info.description: REST and WebSocket API for the Strom pipeline engine

get.summary: Get authentication status
List all block definitions (built-in + user-defined).

post.summary: Create a new user-defined block.

get.summary: Get all block categories.
Get a specific block definition by ID.

post.summary: Receive client-side log messages from the WHIP ingest page.
post.description:
Accepts a JSON array of log entries and writes them to the server log
prefixed with `[WHIP-CLIENT]` so they can be correlated with server-side events.

get.summary: List streams being announced by this Strom instance.
List all discovered devices.

post.summary: Refresh discovered devices (trigger re-scan).

get.summary: Get device discovery status.
Get a specific device by ID.

post.summary: Refresh NDI sources (trigger re-scan).

get.summary: List all discovered NDI sources.
Get NDI discovery status.
List all discovered AES67 streams.
Get a specific discovered stream by ID.
Get the raw SDP for a discovered stream.
List all available GStreamer elements.

Get detailed information about a specific element type.
This endpoint triggers lazy loading of element properties.
Properties are introspected on-demand and cached for future requests.

Get pad properties for a specific element type.
This endpoint introspects pad properties on-demand for better safety.
List all flows.

post.summary: Create a new flow.
Animate a single input's position and/or size.
post.description:
Smoothly animates the specified input from its current position/size
to the target values over the specified duration.

404.description: Flow not running or block not found

post.summary: Toggle a DSK (Downstream Keyer) layer on a vision mixer block.
Toggle Fade to Black on a vision mixer block.
Reset accumulated loudness measurements on an EBU R128 meter block.

404.description: Flow not running or block not found

post.summary: Control the media player (play, pause, stop, next, previous).
Go to a specific file in the playlist.
Set the playlist for a media player block.
Seek to a position in the current file.

get.summary: Get the current state of a media player block.

post.summary: Select a preview source on a vision mixer block.
Force an immediate file split on a recorder block.

400.description: Failed to trigger split (e.g. ts_passthrough mode)

404.description: Flow not running or block not found

get.summary: Generate SDP for a specific block in a flow.
get.description:
Returns the SDP (Session Description Protocol) data for AES67 output blocks.
This SDP can be used by receivers to connect to the audio stream.

400.description: Block type does not support SDP

post.summary: Trigger a scene transition on a compositor block.
post.description:
Animates the transition between two inputs on a compositor/mixer block.
Supported transition types:
- `cut`: Instant switch (no animation)
- `fade`: Cross-fade via alpha blending
- `slide_left`: New input slides in from the right
- `slide_right`: New input slides in from the left
- `slide_up`: New input slides in from the bottom
- `slide_down`: New input slides in from the top

404.description: Flow not running or block not found

get.summary: Get current property values from a pad in a running element.
get.description:
Returns all readable properties and their current values from a specific pad
on an element in a running pipeline. This is useful for elements like compositor
where you need to control individual sink pad properties (alpha, xpos, ypos, zorder).

404.description: Flow not running, element not found, or pad not found

patch.summary: Update a property on a pad in a running pipeline element.
patch.description:
Allows live modification of pad properties while the pipeline is running.
This is essential for elements like compositor, glvideomixer, and audiomixer
where you need to control individual input pad properties.
Common pad properties include:
- alpha: Opacity/transparency (0.0 to 1.0)
- xpos, ypos: Position in pixels
- width, height: Size in pixels
- zorder: Layer order (higher values are on top)

400.description: Property cannot be changed in current state or invalid value

404.description: Flow not running, element not found, or pad not found

get.summary: Get current property values from a running element.
get.description:
Returns all readable properties and their current values from an element
in a running pipeline. The pipeline must be started for this endpoint to work.

404.description: Flow not running or element not found

patch.summary: Update a property on a running pipeline element.
patch.description:
Allows live modification of element properties while the pipeline is running.
Only properties marked as mutable in the current pipeline state can be updated.
The property mutability flags (mutable_in_playing, etc.) can be checked via
the element info endpoint.

400.description: Property cannot be changed in current state or invalid value

404.description: Flow not running or element not found

get.summary: Get a specific flow by ID.

put.description: This is an alias for the POST update endpoint, provided for RESTful API conventions.

post.summary: Update an existing flow.

get.summary: Get a thumbnail image from a block's video tap.
get.description:
Works with any block that exposes thumbnail tee elements, including
`builtin.thumbnail` (index 0) and compositor blocks (one per input).
The first request activates the thumbnail branch; subsequent requests
are served from cache.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Tap index (default 0, e.g. compositor input index)

404.description: Flow not running or block not found

get.summary: Get debug information for a running flow.
get.description:
Returns pipeline timing information including base_time, clock_time, and
running_time. This is useful for debugging AES67/RFC 7273 RTP timestamp
issues where precise clock synchronization is critical.

get.summary: Generate a debug DOT/SVG graph for a flow's pipeline.
get.description:
This endpoint generates a GraphViz DOT graph of the GStreamer pipeline
and converts it to SVG format. The SVG is returned directly and can be
viewed in a browser.

200.description: SVG debug graph of the pipeline

404.description: Flow not found or not running

500.description: Failed to generate graph (Graphviz not installed)

get.summary: Get runtime dynamic pads for a flow.
get.description:
Returns information about dynamic pads (like decodebin outputs) that were
created at runtime and auto-linked to tees. These pads can be connected
to other elements in the UI.

404.description: Flow not found or not running

get.summary: Get pipeline latency for a running flow.
get.description:
Returns the latency information for a running pipeline. The flow must be
started and in PLAYING state for latency information to be available.

404.description: Flow not running or latency not available

get.summary: List active probes on a flow.

404.description: Flow not found or not running

post.summary: Activate a buffer age probe on a pad.

404.description: Flow not found or not running

patch.summary: Update flow properties (description, clock type, etc.).
patch.description:
Updates the configuration properties of a flow. The flow must be stopped
to change certain properties like the clock type.

get.summary: Get runtime statistics for a flow's pipeline.
get.description:
Returns RTP statistics from running pipeline elements, such as jitterbuffer
statistics for AES67 input blocks. The flow must be started and running
for statistics to be available.

404.description: Flow not running or no RTP statistics available

post.summary: Start a flow (pipeline).
Stop a flow (pipeline).

get.summary: Get WebRTC statistics from a running flow.
get.description:
Returns statistics from all webrtcbin elements in the pipeline, including
those nested in bins like whepclientsrc and whipclientsink. Stats include
RTP stream information, ICE connection state, and raw stats data.

post.summary: Export elements and links to gst-launch-1.0 syntax.
Parse a gst-launch-1.0 pipeline string and extract elements and links.
post.description:
This uses GStreamer's native pipeline parser to ensure complete compatibility
with the gst-launch-1.0 syntax.

get.summary: GET /api/ice-servers - Get configured ICE servers for WebRTC connections.

post.summary: Login handler
Logout handler

get.summary: GET /api/mcp - Open SSE stream for server-initiated messages.
get.description:
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for receiving server-initiated
JSON-RPC messages (notifications, requests from server).

post.summary: POST /api/mcp - Handle JSON-RPC requests.
post.description:
Accepts JSON-RPC requests and returns either:
- `application/json` for simple responses
- `text/event-stream` for streaming responses (not implemented yet)

The `Mcp-Session-Id` header is assigned on initialize and required for subsequent requests.

delete.description: Terminates the session identified by the `Mcp-Session-Id` header.

get.summary: List contents of a media directory.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Directory path relative to media root

post.summary: Create a directory.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Directory path relative to media root

400.description: Invalid path or directory not empty

get.summary: Download a file.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to media root

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to media root

post.summary: Rename a file or directory.
Upload files to a directory.

get.summary: List all network interfaces on the system.
get.description:
Returns information about all network interfaces including name, MAC address,
and IP addresses. Useful for selecting which interface to use for multicast
operations (e.g., AES67 streams).

get.summary: Get available source flows for subscription.
get.description:
Returns all flows that have InterOutput blocks, along with information
about whether each output is currently active (flow is running).
This scans all flow definitions, not just running flows.

get.summary: Get version and build information
get.description:
Returns comprehensive version information including:
- Package version from Cargo.toml
- Git commit hash
- Git tag (if on a tagged release)
- Git branch name
- Working directory status (dirty/clean)
- Build timestamp

get.summary: GET /api/whep-streams - List all active WHEP streams (JSON API).
List active WHIP endpoints (public API, no auth required).
WebSocket endpoint for real-time bidirectional communication.

post.summary:
Proxy POST requests to /whep/{endpoint_id}
Looks up the internal port from WhepRegistry and forwards to localhost:{port}/whep/endpoint

201.description: WHEP session created, SDP answer returned

502.description: Proxy error forwarding to internal WHEP server
Proxy error forwarding to internal WHEP server

patch.summary: Proxy PATCH requests to /whep/{endpoint_id}/resource/{resource_id} for ICE candidates

502.description: Proxy error forwarding to internal WHEP server

post.summary: Handle WHIP POST request (SDP offer from client).
post.description:
Creates a new whipserversrc element for this session, proxies the SDP offer
to it, and registers the session with the WhipSessionManager.

201.description: WHIP session created, SDP answer returned

502.description: Proxy error forwarding to internal WHIP server

503.description: WHIP element busy, retry in a moment

options.summary: Handle CORS preflight for WHIP endpoints.

delete.description:
Proxies the DELETE to the session's whipserversrc, then tears down the element
and removes the session from the session manager.

404.description: WHIP endpoint or session not found

502.description: Proxy error forwarding to internal WHIP server

options.summary: Handle CORS preflight for WHIP resource endpoints.

patch.summary: Handle WHIP PATCH request (ICE trickle from client).
patch.description: Looks up the session's port by resource_id and proxies the PATCH.

404.description: WHIP endpoint or session not found

502.description: Proxy error forwarding to internal WHIP server

ActivateProbeRequest.description: Request to activate a buffer age probe on a pad.

element_id.description: Element ID to probe (standalone element or block ID)

AnimateInputRequest.description: Request to animate a single input's position/size.

xpos.description: Target X position (optional, keeps current if not specified)

announce_interface.description: Network interface the stream is announced on (None = all interfaces).

auth_required.description: Whether authentication is required for this server

authenticated.description: Whether the current session is authenticated

AvailableOutput.description: Information about an available published output from a source flow.

channel_name.description: Channel name for inter-pipeline communication (what InterInput blocks use)

flow_name.description: Name of the flow that publishes this output

is_active.description: Whether the source flow is currently running (output is active)

name.description: Name of the published output (block ID)

AvailableSourcesResponse.description: Response containing available source flows for subscription.

sources.description: List of flows that have published outputs

BlockDefinition.description:
Block definition - metadata for creating block instances.

Note: Built-in blocks use the BlockBuilder trait to create GStreamer elements directly.
User-defined blocks are not yet supported.

built_in.description: Whether this is a built-in block (read-only) or user-defined

description.description: Description of what this block does

exposed_properties.description: Exposed properties that users can configure

external_pads.description: External pads exposed by this block

id.description: Unique identifier for this block definition

oneOf.description:
Computed external pads for this instance based on properties
If None, falls back to the pads from the block definition
This allows blocks to have dynamic pads based on their configuration

runtime_data.description:
Runtime data (not persisted to storage, only available when flow is running)
Used for things like generated SDP for AES67 blocks

BlockListResponse.description: Response containing a list of blocks

BlockStats.description: Statistics for a single block instance.

collected_at.description: Timestamp when these stats were collected (nanoseconds since epoch)

stats.description: Collection of statistics for this block

dark_fill_color.description: Fill/background color in dark mode (hex color)

dark_stroke_color.description: Stroke/border color in dark mode (hex color)

dark_text_color.description: Text color in dark mode (hex color)

height.description: Height in the editor (in grid units)

icon.description: Icon or visual identifier (emoji or name)

light_fill_color.description: Fill/background color in light mode (hex color)

light_stroke_color.description: Stroke/border color in light mode (hex color)

light_text_color.description: Text color in light mode (hex color)

width.description: Width in the editor (in grid units)

oneOf.description: Subscribe to updates for a specific flow
Unsubscribe from updates for a specific flow

ClientMessage.description: Messages sent from client to server via WebSocket.

CpuAffinity.description:
CPU affinity strategy for GStreamer streaming threads.

Controls whether pipeline threads are pinned to a single CPU core
for better cache locality and reduced context switches.

CreateBlockRequest.description: Request to create a new block definition (currently not supported for user-defined blocks)

path.description: Path for new directory (relative to media root)

CreateFlowRequest.description: Request to create a new flow.

ndi_available.description: Whether NDI device provider is available.

DeviceResponse.description: API response for a discovered device.

DiscoveredStreamResponse.description: API response for a discovered AES67 stream.

received_on_interface.description: Network interface the stream was discovered on (for SAP).

DskToggleRequest.description: Request to toggle a DSK (Downstream Keyer) layer on a vision mixer block.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the DSK layer

DskToggleResponse.description: Response after toggling a DSK layer.

DynamicPadsResponse.description: Response containing runtime dynamic pads information.

pads.description:
Map of element_id -> {pad_name -> tee_element_name}
These are pads that appeared at runtime without defined links.

Element.description: Represents a GStreamer element instance in a flow.

id.description: Unique identifier for this element instance

position.description: Display position in the visual editor (x, y)

ElementInfo.description: Information about a GStreamer element type (for discovery/palette).

ElementInfoResponse.description: Response containing detailed information about a specific element.

ElementListResponse.description: Response containing information about available elements.

ElementPropertiesResponse.description: Response containing current property values from a running element.

EnumValue.description: Enum value with optional label for display

label.description: Optional human-readable label for UI display

ExportGstLaunchRequest.description: Request to convert flow elements/links to gst-launch-1.0 syntax.

ExportGstLaunchResponse.description: Response containing the gst-launch-1.0 pipeline string.

ExposedProperty.description: Property exposed by a block to the outside

label.description: Human-readable label for display in UI (e.g., "Auth Token" instead of "auth_token")

name.description: Name of the exposed property (used as key)

internal_element_id.description: Which internal element and pad this maps to

label.description: Optional display label (shown in graph editor)

ExternalPads.description: External pads that the block exposes

inputs.description: Input pads (mapped to internal element pads)

outputs.description: Output pads (mapped to internal element pads)

FadeToBlackRequest.description: Request to toggle Fade to Black on a vision mixer block.

FadeToBlackResponse.description: Response after toggling Fade to Black.

Flow.description:
A complete GStreamer pipeline definition.

A flow represents a named, configured GStreamer pipeline that can be
started, stopped, and persisted.

oneOf.description:
Raw GStreamer pipeline state, exposed for diagnostics.

Prefer [`running`](Self::running) for logic and display.

links.description: Links between element pads and/or block external pads

running.description:
Whether the pipeline is actively running (data flowing).

This is the field most callers should use. It is `true` when the
GStreamer pipeline is in `Playing` *or* in `Paused` due to an
async element that has not yet completed its transition.

FlowDebugInfo.description:
Debug information for a running flow's pipeline.
Provides detailed timing, clock, and state information for troubleshooting.

base_time_ns.description: Pipeline base_time in nanoseconds (reference point for running_time calculation)

element_count.description: Number of elements in the pipeline

is_live.description: Whether this is a live pipeline

ptp_grandmaster.description: PTP grandmaster clock ID (only if using PTP clock)

running_time_formatted.description: Human-readable running_time (how long the pipeline has been playing)

running_time_ns.description: Current running time in nanoseconds (clock_time - base_time)

FlowListResponse.description: Response containing a list of flows.

auto_restart.description:
Whether this flow should be automatically restarted when the backend starts
(set to true when starting a flow, false when manually stopping it)

oneOf.description: Clock synchronization status (updated by backend for running pipelines)

clock_type.description: GStreamer clock type to use for this flow

cpu_affinity.description:
CPU affinity for GStreamer streaming threads
SingleCore pins all threads to one core for better cache locality

created_at.description:
Timestamp when the flow was created
ISO 8601 format with timezone

last_modified.description:
Timestamp when the flow was last modified (any change to flow config)
ISO 8601 format with timezone

ntp_server.description:
NTP server address (hostname or IP, only used when clock_type is NTP)
If not set but clock_type is NTP, will signal as "ntp=/traceable/"

ptp_domain.description: PTP domain (0-255, only used when clock_type is PTP)

oneOf.description: PTP clock information (updated by backend when clock_type is PTP)

started_at.description:
Timestamp when the flow was started (entered Playing state)
ISO 8601 format with timezone (e.g., "2024-01-15T14:30:00+01:00")
None if the flow has never been started or is currently stopped

thread_priority.description:
Thread priority for GStreamer streaming threads
Default is High (elevated but not realtime)

oneOf.description: Status of thread priority configuration (updated by backend when pipeline starts)

FlowStatsResponse.description: Response containing statistics for a running flow.

blocks.description: Statistics for each block in the flow

collected_at.description: Timestamp when stats were collected (nanoseconds since UNIX epoch)

GStreamerClockType.description:
GStreamer clock type selection.

Maps to GStreamer's clock implementations:
- `Monotonic`: SystemClock with GST_CLOCK_TYPE_MONOTONIC (default)
- `Realtime`: SystemClock with GST_CLOCK_TYPE_REALTIME
- `Ptp`: PtpClock for IEEE 1588 PTP synchronization
- `Ntp`: NtpClock for NTP synchronization

GlRendererInfo.description: OpenGL renderer information detected from GStreamer's GL context.

GotoRequest.description: Request to go to a specific file.

GpuStats.description: GPU statistics for a single GPU device.

IceServer.description:
ICE server configuration for WebRTC.
For TURN servers, username and credential are extracted from the URL.

IceServersResponse.description: Response structure for ICE servers endpoint.

live.description: Whether the pipeline is a live pipeline

max_latency_formatted.description: Maximum latency formatted as human-readable string

min_latency_formatted.description: Minimum latency formatted as human-readable string (e.g., "10.5 ms")

Link.description:
A link between two element pads.

For API/serialization compatibility, this uses strings. Internally converted to ElementPadRef.

current_path.description: Current directory path (relative to media root)

parent_path.description: Parent directory path (None if at root)

MediaFileEntry.description: A file or directory entry in a media directory listing.

path.description: Full path relative to media root

size.description: File size in bytes (0 for directories)

available.description: Whether NDI discovery is available (plugin installed).

ipv4_addresses.description: IPv4 addresses assigned to this interface

ipv6_addresses.description: IPv6 addresses assigned to this interface

is_loopback.description: Whether this interface is a loopback interface

is_up.description: Whether this interface appears to be up (has addresses)

NetworkInterfacesResponse.description: Response containing list of network interfaces.

properties.description: Properties available on this pad template

PadPresence.description: Pad presence type (static, dynamic, or request).

PadPropertiesResponse.description: Response containing current property values from a pad.

ParseGstLaunchRequest.description: Request to parse a gst-launch-1.0 pipeline string.

pipeline.description:
The gst-launch-1.0 pipeline string to parse
Example: "videotestsrc pattern=ball ! videoconvert ! autovideosink"

ParseGstLaunchResponse.description: Response containing parsed pipeline elements and links.

elements.description: Elements extracted from the parsed pipeline

PipelineState.description:
GStreamer pipeline state.

These states correspond to the GStreamer GST_STATE enum.

PlayerControlRequest.description: Request to control the media player.

PlayerStateResponse.description: Response with the current player state.

total_files.description: Total number of files in playlist

sample_count.description: Number of samples collected so far

construct_only.description: Property can only be set during construction

controllable.description: Property can be controlled over time with GstController

mutable_in_null.description: Property can be changed in NULL state

mutable_in_paused.description: Property can be changed in PAUSED state

mutable_in_playing.description: Property can be changed in PLAYING state (live editing!)

mutable_in_ready.description: Property can be changed in READY state

PropertyMapping.description: Maps an exposed property to one or more internal element properties

element_id.description: Which internal element's property to set

oneOf.description: Network interface selector - frontend fetches available interfaces from API

PropertyType.description: Property type enumeration for exposed properties

PropertyValue.description:
Property value that can be various types.

GStreamer properties can be strings, numbers, booleans, enums, etc.

PtpInfo.description:
PTP clock information (IEEE 1588).

Contains detailed information about the PTP clock state including
grandmaster and master clock identities, and synchronization statistics.

domain.description: PTP domain currently in use by the running pipeline (0-255)

grandmaster_clock_id.description: Grandmaster clock ID (EUI-64 format as hex string, e.g., "00:11:22:FF:FE:33:44:55")

master_clock_id.description: Master clock ID (EUI-64 format as hex string)

restart_needed.description: True if configured domain differs from running domain (restart needed)

synced.description: Whether the clock is synchronized with a PTP master

PtpStats.description:
PTP clock synchronization statistics.

Contains measurements from PTP clock synchronization including
path delay, clock offset, and estimation quality.

clock_offset_ns.description:
Clock offset/discontinuity in nanoseconds (positive = local clock ahead)
This is the correction being applied to keep clocks synchronized

clock_rate.description:
Clock rate ratio (local clock speed relative to PTP master)
1.0 means clocks run at same speed, <1.0 means local is slower

last_update.description: Timestamp of last statistics update (Unix timestamp in seconds)

mean_path_delay_ns.description: Mean path delay to master clock in nanoseconds

r_squared.description:
R-squared value of clock estimation regression (0.0-1.0, higher is better)
Values close to 1.0 indicate stable, accurate synchronization

RenameMediaRequest.description: Request to rename a file or directory.

new_name.description: New name (just the filename, not full path)

fraction_lost.description: Fraction of packets lost in last interval (0.0-1.0, inbound only)

SeekRequest.description: Request to seek to a position.

SelectPreviewRequest.description: Request to select a preview source on a vision mixer block.

input.description: Index of the input to set as preview (0-based)

SelectPreviewResponse.description: Response after selecting a preview source.

ServerMessage.description: Messages sent from server to client via WebSocket.

SourceFlowInfo.description: Information about a flow that has published outputs.

description.description: Description of what this statistic measures

oneOf.description: Counter - monotonically increasing value (e.g., packets received)

value.description: Counter - monotonically increasing value (e.g., packets received)

oneOf.description: Gauge - value that can go up or down (e.g., buffer level)

value.description: Gauge - value that can go up or down (e.g., buffer level)

StatValue.description: A single statistic value with metadata.

Statistic.description: A statistic with its current value and metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for this statistic within the block

data.description: A flow was created
A flow was updated
A flow was deleted
A flow was started
A flow was stopped
A flow's state changed
Pipeline error occurred
Pipeline warning message
Pipeline info message
Pipeline reached end of stream

oneOf.description: Element property was changed on a running pipeline

data.description: Element property was changed on a running pipeline

oneOf.description: Pad property was changed on a running pipeline

data.description: Pad property was changed on a running pipeline

oneOf.description: Ping event to keep connection alive
Audio level meter data from GStreamer level element

data.description: Audio level meter data from GStreamer level element

decay.description: Decay values in dB for each channel

peak.description: Peak values in dB for each channel

rms.description: RMS values in dB for each channel

oneOf.description: Audio spectrum analyzer data from GStreamer spectrum element

data.description: Audio spectrum analyzer data from GStreamer spectrum element

magnitudes.description: Magnitude values in dB per channel, each inner Vec is one channel's frequency bands

oneOf.description: EBU R128 loudness measurement data from GStreamer ebur128level element

data.description: EBU R128 loudness measurement data from GStreamer ebur128level element

true_peak.description: True peak per channel in dBTP

oneOf.description: Audio latency measurement data from GStreamer audiolatency element

data.description: Audio latency measurement data from GStreamer audiolatency element

average_latency_us.description: Running average latency in microseconds (last 5 measurements)

data.description: System monitoring statistics (CPU and GPU)

oneOf.description: Thread CPU statistics for GStreamer streaming threads

data.description: Thread CPU statistics for GStreamer streaming threads

oneOf.description: PTP clock statistics for a flow

data.description: PTP clock statistics for a flow

mean_path_delay_ns.description: Mean path delay to master in nanoseconds

oneOf.description: A flow's published output became available (flow started)

data.description: A flow's published output became available (flow started)

oneOf.description: A flow's published output became unavailable (flow stopped)

data.description: A flow's published output became unavailable (flow stopped)
Subscription connection status changed

oneOf.description: Quality of Service statistics (aggregated buffer drop info)

data.description: Quality of Service statistics (aggregated buffer drop info)

block_id.description: Block ID if element is inside a block, None if standalone element

element_id.description: Element ID (standalone element ID or block ID if element is in block)

event_count.description: Number of QoS events in aggregation period

internal_element_type.description: Internal element type if part of a block (e.g., "videoconvert")

oneOf.description: A new AES67 stream was discovered via SAP or mDNS

data.description: A new AES67 stream was discovered via SAP or mDNS
A discovered stream was updated (re-announced)

oneOf.description: A discovered stream expired or was deleted

data.description: A discovered stream expired or was deleted
Media player position update (periodic)

total_files.description: Total number of files in playlist

data.description: Media player state changed

oneOf.description: A transition was triggered on a compositor block

data.description: A transition was triggered on a compositor block

oneOf.description: Audio analyzer waveform and vectorscope data from appsink

data.description: Audio analyzer waveform and vectorscope data from appsink

vectorscope_l.description: Vectorscope L channel samples (base64-encoded i8 samples)

vectorscope_r.description: Vectorscope R channel samples (base64-encoded i8 samples)

waveform_l_max.description: Waveform max values per column for L channel (base64-encoded i8 samples)

waveform_l_min.description: Waveform min values per column for L channel (base64-encoded i8 samples)

waveform_r_max.description: Waveform max values per column for R channel (base64-encoded i8 samples)

waveform_r_min.description: Waveform min values per column for R channel (base64-encoded i8 samples)

oneOf.description: Recorder block started writing a new file

data.description: Recorder block started writing a new file

filename.description: Full path to the file currently being written

oneOf.description: Recorder block reached its configured max duration and requests the flow to stop

data.description: Recorder block reached its configured max duration and requests the flow to stop

oneOf.description: Buffer age warning (buffer is older than threshold)

data.description: Buffer age warning (buffer is older than threshold)

threshold_ms.description: Threshold that was exceeded, in milliseconds

data.description: Manual buffer age probe measurement

oneOf.description: A manual buffer age probe was activated

data.description: A manual buffer age probe was activated

oneOf.description: A manual buffer age probe was deactivated

data.description: A manual buffer age probe was deactivated

Vision mixer DSK layer toggled

StromEvent.description: Event types that can be broadcast to all connected clients.

SystemInfo.description: Server system information: version, build, runtime environment, and host details.

build_id.description: Unique build ID (UUID) generated at compile time

git_dirty.description: Whether the working directory had uncommitted changes

git_tag.description: Git tag (if on a tagged commit)

in_docker.description: Whether running inside a Docker container

process_started_at.description: When the Strom server process was started (ISO 8601 format with timezone)

system_boot_time.description: When the system was booted (ISO 8601 format with timezone)

oneOf.description: OpenGL renderer info from GStreamer (if available)

num_cores.description: Number of CPU cores available to this process (cgroup-aware)

ThreadCpuStats.description: CPU statistics for a single GStreamer streaming thread.

block_id.description: Block ID if the element is inside a block

element_name.description: Name of the GStreamer element that owns this thread

flow_id.description: Flow ID this thread belongs to

pinned_cpus.description:
Logical CPUs this thread is pinned to (None if affinity is off).
Contains all sibling hyperthreads of the allocated physical core.

ThreadPriority.description:
Thread priority level for GStreamer streaming threads.

Controls the scheduling priority of GStreamer's internal streaming threads.
Higher priorities help ensure smooth media processing under system load.

ThreadPriorityStatus.description: Status of thread priority configuration for a running pipeline.

achieved.description: Whether the requested priority was successfully applied

error.description: Error message if priority could not be set (empty if achieved)

threads_configured.description: Number of threads that had priority set

ThreadStats.description: Aggregated thread statistics for all GStreamer streaming threads.

threads.description: Statistics for all active streaming threads

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this snapshot was taken (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

duration_ms.description: Duration of the transition in milliseconds

transition_type.description: The type of transition that was triggered

TriggerTransitionRequest.description: Request to trigger a transition on a compositor block.

duration_ms.description: Duration of the transition in milliseconds (ignored for "cut")

from_input.description: Index of the currently active input (0-based)

to_input.description: Index of the input to transition to (0-based)

UpdatePadPropertyRequest.description: Request to update a property on a pad in a running pipeline.

property_name.description: The name of the property to update

value.description: The new value for the property

UpdatePropertyRequest.description: Request to update a property on a running pipeline element.

property_name.description: The name of the property to update

value.description: The new value for the property

WebRtcConnectionStats.description: Stats for a single WebRTC connection (webrtcbin element).

raw.description: Raw stats as key-value pairs (for debugging/extensibility)

connections.description: Stats for each WebRTC connection (keyed by element name)

WhepStreamInfo.description: Response structure for a WHEP stream.

endpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for the WHEP endpoint

WhepStreamsResponse.description: Response structure for the streams list endpoint.

tags.name: discovery
tags.description: AES67 stream and device discovery endpoints
